mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dicom_server_callback_log ( event, accession_number, dicom_server_study_id, dicom_server_patient_id, dicom_server_series_ids, payload, success, error_message, warning_message, received_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{event}, #{accessionNumber}, #{dicomServerStudyId}, #{dicomServerPatientId}, CAST(COALESCE(#{dicomServerSeriesIdsJson}, '[]') AS JSONB), CAST(COALESCE(#{payloadJson}, '{}') AS JSONB), COALESCE(#{success}, false), #{errorMessage}, #{warningMessage}, COALESCE(CAST(#{receivedAtIso} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), NOW()), NOW() )
